x-artifact.note: Design-first artifact only — describes the MCP tool surface, not a running server. Tool input/output schemas $ref the same object schemas as the OpenAPI; each tool maps to an OpenAPI operationId. Surfaces the citywide platform OTI already operates — the NYC Open Data catalog, the api.nyc.gov gateway (GeoClient/GeoSearch), LinkNYC, municipal broadband, public Wi-Fi, and 311 — and adds register_dataset and request_api_key, the net-new write workflows that would productize OTI's operator role into one owned, agent-native gateway + catalog API.

server.name: io.nyc.oti
server.title: NYC Office of Technology & Innovation (OTI)
server.description: Agent-native access to the citywide platform the NYC Office of Technology & Innovation operates — search and register NYC Open Data datasets, discover services on the api.nyc.gov gateway and request keys, geocode addresses via GeoClient/GeoSearch, and query LinkNYC kiosks, municipal-broadband assets, public Wi-Fi hotspots, and 311 service requests.
server.instructions: OTI is the city's platform operator, so this server is the natural front door to the whole corpus. Use search_datasets / get_dataset to discover any of the 2,300+ NYC Open Data assets in the catalog OTI runs, and register_dataset to submit a new one (write — confirm agency, name, and description first). Use list_gateway_services / get_gateway_service to see what is published on api.nyc.gov (GeoClient, GeoSearch, ...) and request_api_key to obtain a subscription key (write — collect applicant email and use case, api.nyc.gov returns 401 until a key is granted). geocode resolves a NYC address to coordinates and the geography spine (BBL/BIN/borough/council district). find_linknyc_kiosks covers kiosk locations and live Wi-Fi/tablet/phone status; find_broadband_assets covers fiber/wireless readiness in target neighborhoods; find_wifi_hotspots covers the public Wi-Fi inventory; find_service_requests queries the 311 pipeline (the single most-viewed dataset in the city). The two write tools mutate state and require an authenticated caller.

tools.name: search_datasets
tools.title: Search Datasets
tools.description: Search the NYC Open Data catalog OTI operates by agency, category, type, release status, and/or free text.

tools.name: get_dataset
tools.title: Get Dataset
tools.description: Fetch a NYC Open Data catalog record by its Socrata four-by-four UID (e.g. 'erm2-nwe9').

tools.name: register_dataset
tools.title: Register Dataset
tools.description: Register / publish a new data asset to the OTI-operated catalog (LL251 inventory). NET-NEW write workflow with no public API today. Mutates state and requires an authenticated caller — confirm agency, name, and description with the user before submitting.

tools.name: list_gateway_services
tools.title: List Gateway Services
tools.description: List services published on the api.nyc.gov gateway (Azure API Management) OTI operates — GeoClient, GeoSearch, and other agency APIs — by agency, category, or status.

tools.name: get_gateway_service
tools.title: Get Gateway Service
tools.description: Fetch one api.nyc.gov gateway service by id (e.g. 'geoclient', 'geosearch'), including auth type and how to obtain a key.

tools.name: request_api_key
tools.title: Request API Key
tools.description: Request an api.nyc.gov gateway subscription key for a service. NET-NEW write workflow — today keys are provisioned through a developer portal, not an API, and api.nyc.gov returns 401 until one is granted. Mutates state and requires an authenticated caller — collect applicant email and use case first.

tools.name: geocode
tools.title: Geocode Address
tools.description: Resolve a NYC address or intersection to coordinates and the geography spine (BBL, BIN, borough, community district, council district) via the OTI-operated GeoClient / GeoSearch services.

tools.name: find_linknyc_kiosks
tools.title: Find LinkNYC Kiosks
tools.description: Search LinkNYC public Wi-Fi / communications kiosks by borough, installation status, kiosk type, or live Wi-Fi status.

tools.name: find_broadband_assets
tools.title: Find Broadband Assets
tools.description: Search municipal-broadband infrastructure assets (fiber/wireless readiness of buildings in target neighborhoods) by borough, asset class, fiber connectivity, or target neighborhood.

tools.name: find_wifi_hotspots
tools.title: Find Wi-Fi Hotspots
tools.description: Search the citywide public Wi-Fi hotspot inventory (libraries, parks, LinkNYC, partner networks) by borough, provider, or type.

tools.name: find_service_requests
tools.title: Find 311 Service Requests
tools.description: Query the citywide 311 service-request pipeline OTI operates (the single most-viewed dataset in NYC Open Data) by borough, agency, problem type, status, channel, or date range.
